\[ \frac{1 \text{ hour}}{0.12 \text{ hour/client}} = \frac{1}{0.12} \approx 8.33 \text{ clients per hour} \]

The combined rate of acquiring new clients is the sum of the individual rates:
\[ 8.33 \text{ clients per hour} + 5 \text{ clients per hour} = 13.33 \text{ clients per hour} \]

\[ 8.33 \text{ clients per hour} + 5 \text{ clients per hour} = 13.33 \text{ clients per hour} \]
